name: Porkaghetti Platter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pork roasts into strips, 1/4 inch thick and 2 to 3 inches long.
2. In a bowl, mix flour, salt, and pepper; dredge the pork in the mixture, reserving any excess flour.
3. Add tomato sauce, water, onion, oregano, rosemary, and garlic powder to the pork strips. Stir to combine.
4. Cover tightly and simmer for 45 minutes or until the meat is tender. Stir in mushrooms and olives, then continue cooking covered for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Cook spaghetti according to package directions, drain, and arrange on a platter.
6. Serve the meat and sauce with spaghetti, sprinkling with Romano cheese.
